translations.en: a solemn man, constantly dusting and polishing the items in his shop.
translations.zh: 一位嚴肅之男子，不停地擦拭店內各件物品。

translations.en: The old man never turns away from his telescope. "Shhh! Can't you see I'm busy?!"
translations.zh: 老人目不離望遠鏡。「噓！看不出來吾正忙著嗎？！」

translations.en: "Whoever you are, come back in the morning."
translations.zh: 「不論汝是何人，明早再來吧。」

translations.en: The old man adjusts the telescope, exclaims "Aha!" and starts scribbling on a scroll.
translations.zh: 老人調整望遠鏡，大叫「啊哈！」，隨即在卷軸上奮筆疾書。

translations.en: "Ahem. Yes, what can I help you with,
translations.zh: 「咳，是，吾能為汝效勞，

translations.en: madam?"
translations.zh: 女士？」

translations.en: sir?"
translations.zh: 先生？」

translations.en: "I am Ephemerides."
translations.zh: 「吾乃以弗美里迪斯。」

translations.en: "I am an astronomer. More precisely, I calculate movements of the stars, phases of the @moons..."
translations.zh: 「吾乃天文學者。更精確地說，吾計算星辰運行及@moons（月相）變化……」

translations.en: "My field of specialization is @tidal predictions."
translations.zh: 「吾之專精乃@tidal（潮汐）預測。」

translations.en: "I also make various @glasswares and @instruments."
translations.zh: 「吾亦製造各式@glasswares（玻璃）器皿及@instruments（儀器）。」

translations.en: "Yes, @sextants mostly."
translations.zh: 「是的，主要是@sextants（六分）儀。」

translations.en: "Lenses and the like."
translations.zh: 「鏡片之類的物件。」

translations.en: "Lord British has requested the publication of an almanac for use by the general populace."
translations.zh: 「不列顛王已下令編纂一部年鑑，供普通百姓使用。」

translations.en: "It will contain high tides, low tides, ebb tides, flood tides, @spring tides, and @neap tides."
translations.zh: 「其中將收錄高潮、低潮、退潮、漲潮、@spring（大潮）及@neap（小潮）等資料。」

translations.en: "Britannia's tides are a function of the two @moons, Felucca and Trammel, interacting with our world, Sosaria."
translations.zh: 「不列顛尼亞的潮汐，乃兩@moons（月）——費魯卡與崔梅爾——與吾等世界索薩利亞交互作用之結果。」

translations.en: "I plan to publish a paper about how the world is flat, to dispel all this foolish talk to the contrary."
translations.zh: 「吾計劃發表一篇論文，闡明大地乃是平坦的，以破除那些荒謬的反面言論。」

translations.en: "Afterwards, I will construct a model of how it all works: an @orrery."
translations.zh: 「此後，吾將建造一具展示其運作原理的模型：即@orrery（天體）儀。」

translations.en: Pleased with your interest, Ephemerides shows you papers with plans for a clockwork model of the Sosarian system.
translations.zh: 以弗美里迪斯見汝感興趣，喜出望外，向汝展示一份索薩利亞星系齒輪模型的設計圖。

translations.en: "This, ahem, flat piece is Britannia. Each moon would exert a pull on the oceans thus, resulting in the tides."
translations.zh: 「這個，咳，扁平的部分即是不列顛尼亞。每個月球如此對海洋施加引力，從而產生潮汐。」

translations.en: "You turn that little handle there to get it to go!"*
translations.zh: 「轉動那個小把手，模型就會動起來！」*

translations.en: The normally staid Ephemerides is practically giggling with glee.
translations.zh: 一向嚴肅的以弗美里迪斯此刻幾乎欣喜得咯咯笑個不停。

translations.en: "Absurd!"
translations.zh: 「荒謬！」

translations.en: "Low and high tide marks are close together. The planets are in @quadrature."
translations.zh: 「低潮與高潮水位相距甚近。諸天體正處於@quadrature（矩象）之中。」

translations.en: "Angular separation of two celestial bodies (as measured from a third) being ninety degrees, of course. A very safe @tide."
translations.zh: 「即兩天體（以第三天體為基點量測）夾角為九十度，此乃最安全之@tide（潮汐）狀態，自然。」

translations.en: "The opposite of a neap tide; the sun, earth and moons are all aligned."
translations.zh: 「與小潮相反；日、地、月三者連成一線之時。」

translations.en: "Thus, lines of low and high tide are far apart."
translations.zh: 「因此低潮與高潮水位相差懸殊。」

translations.en: "Once I construct my @orrery, I'd be able to demonstrate the principles involved."
translations.zh: 「一旦吾建好@orrery（天體）儀，便能向汝展示其中原理。」

translations.en: "I hope the lens I made you will prove suitable."
translations.zh: 「但願吾為汝製作的鏡片能合汝之用。」

translations.en: "What sort of lens do you want?"
translations.zh: 「汝想要何種鏡片？」

translations.en: "When you bring me a glass @sword, I should be able to duplicate your lens for you."
translations.zh: 「汝若帶一把玻璃@sword（劍來），吾應可為汝複製那片鏡片。」

translations.en: "Ooooh, let me see it... That's a very interesting lens."
translations.zh: 「哇哦，讓吾瞧瞧……這真是一片十分有趣的鏡片。」

translations.en: "You need a concave copy of it? Let me think..."
translations.zh: 「汝需要一片凹面複製品？讓吾想想……」

translations.en: "It would be very tricky to duplicate, being magical in nature, but I believe I might be able to do it."
translations.zh: 「此物帶有魔法性質，複製起來頗為棘手，但吾或許能辦到。」

translations.en: "The material and the nature of the enchantment appear similar to those involved in the making of glass swords."
translations.zh: 「其材質與附魔性質，似乎與鑄造玻璃劍所用者相近。」

translations.en: "If I could keep this to analyze while you go get me a glass sword, I'll try and make a copy for you."
translations.zh: 「若汝去為吾取一把玻璃劍的同時，吾可留存此物加以分析，再試著為汝製作複製品。」

translations.en: Before you can protest, he pockets the lens. "Let me know when you have the glass @sword."
translations.zh: 未待汝開口，他已將鏡片收入口袋。「有了玻璃@sword（劍）便告知吾。」

translations.en: "I once heard of a @master glassblower who could make glass swords..."
translations.zh: 「吾曾聽聞有一位@master（大師）級玻璃吹製匠，能製造玻璃劍……」

translations.en: "Minoc is the logical place to look. That town is filled with master craftsmen."
translations.zh: 「米諾克是理所當然的尋訪之地。那座城鎮聚集了許多工藝大師。」

translations.en: "Why, I once heard of a man from Minoc who built a @flying machine!"
translations.zh: 「咦，吾還曾聽說有個米諾克人造出了一台@flying（飛行）機器！」

translations.en: "Must have been a fairy tale, of course."
translations.zh: 「當然，那必定是個神話故事罷了。」

translations.en: "Goodbye, $G. It was nice talking with you."
translations.zh: 「再見，$G。與汝交談甚歡。」

translations.en: "That I cannot help you with."
translations.zh: 「此事吾無能為力。」

translations.en: "Ah, you've brought me a glass sword! Let me just get your lens..."
translations.zh: 「啊，汝帶來了玻璃劍！讓吾先取回汝的鏡片……」

translations.en: He fumbles through his pockets.
translations.zh: 他在口袋裡翻找一番。

translations.en: "Oh no! I seem to have lost the lens!"
translations.zh: 「哦不！鏡片似乎不見了！」

translations.en: "Just kidding... Here it is. Now I'll melt down the glass sword and try to cast a lens for you."
translations.zh: 「開玩笑的……在這裡呢。吾現在將融化那把玻璃劍，試著為汝鑄造一片鏡片。」

translations.en: You watch as he works, intently focused on his task. Finally he pronounces the job a success.
translations.zh: 汝目睹他全神貫注地工作，終於他宣告大功告成。

translations.en: "Here's your lens back, and the duplicate. There's no charge - the challenge of the task was reward enough."
translations.zh: 「汝的鏡片奉還，附上複製品。不收費——完成此等挑戰本身已是最好的回報。」

translations.en: "I don't know what you need these lenses for, but I wish you luck!"
translations.zh: 「吾不知汝要這些鏡片作何用途，但祝汝好運！」

translations.en: "Which of you?"
translations.zh: 「汝等哪一位？」

translations.en: $N looks at $Y. "You haven't any room in your pack."
translations.zh: $N 望向 $Y。「汝的包裹已無空間了。」

translations.en: $N looks at $Y. "`$0s cost more gold than you have."
translations.zh: $N 望向 $Y。「`$0 所需黃金超出汝所持有之數。」

translations.en: $N looks at $Y. "It'll cost you #0 gold for a $0. Do you want one?"
translations.zh: $N 望向 $Y。「一件 $0 需 #0 枚金幣。汝要購買嗎？」

translations.en: $N frowns at $Y, "That was a good price."
translations.zh: $N 皺眉望向 $Y，「那個價錢已是實惠。」

translations.en: He hands $Y a $0.
translations.zh: 他將 $0 遞給 $Y。

translator_notes: 以弗美里迪斯是天文學者兼玻璃工匠，語氣嚴肅帶點幽默（相信世界是平的為搞笑設定）。天文術語盡量忠實翻譯。月球名 Felucca/Trammel 依發音譯。動作描述段（第三人稱）照常譯出。
